result.analysis: MAIN AGENT REPORT: Krasnodar at home in Krasnodar Stadium. Both teams in top form in RPL. Key: Cordoba vs Marichal, Spertsyan creativity vs Dinamo midfield. Tight knockout match. Home crowd pushes Krasnodar over the line in penalties.
result.bet: Draw @ 3.50 + Krasnodar to qualify. BTTS likely.
